dom.title: 9x9 Go Board
dom.body_text_excerpt: 9×9 Go Standalone local Go board with captures, suicide prevention, ko, pass, undo, and area scoring. Current turn Black Game state Playing Pass Undo Reset Score now Black 0 White 0 Move history Click an intersection to place a stone. The board ends after two consecutive passes. Scoring uses simple area scoring: stones on the board plus surrounded empty intersections.
